description:
# Phase 2: Component Expansion

Expand from 13 to 30+ components covering full healthcare content hub needs. Add 12 Tier 1 primitives + 10 Tier 2 composed components. Build @helix/cli, @helix/tailwind-preset. Publish @helix/library@1.0.0 stable. Months 4-8.

## Phases
1. Implement hx-dialog component
2. Implement hx-tabs component
3. Implement hx-accordion component
4. Implement hx-tooltip component
5. Implement hx-avatar component
6. Implement hx-breadcrumb component
7. Implement hx-pagination component
8. Implement hx-icon component
9. Implement hx-progress component
10. Implement hx-skeleton component
11. Implement hx-divider component
12. Implement hx-nav component
13. Build Drupal SDC auto-generation from CEM
14. Build @helix/tailwind-preset package
15. Build @helix/cli tool
16. Publish @helix/library@1.0.0 stable release
title: [Epic] Phase 2: Component Expansion
